title: Properties and Relationships of Closed Sets in a Metric Space
description: A flowchart illustrating the definition, key properties, and equivalent characterizations of closed sets within a metric space (X, d).
elements: Closure of A, Ā = A ∪ A'
relationships: A is closed IF AND ONLY IF it contains all its limit points (A' ⊆ A)
A is closed IF AND ONLY IF its complement A^c is open
The closure of A (Ā) is the smallest closed set containing A
